payload.label: nightstand
payload.long_description: Partial, edge-cropped view of a dark brown wooden nightstand showing the near top corner and side with a glossy finish, visible horizontal wood grain, a beveled front edge and minor surface scuffs; only the corner/top is visible and the object appears roughly 0.8 m from the camera.
